name: harbor
description: Harbor — Vue 3 + Elysia + Bun full-stack monorepo (api, admin, web)

scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run --cwd api dev" "bun run --cwd web dev" "bun run --cwd admin dev"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd api build && bun run --cwd web build && bun run --cwd admin build
scripts.dev:check: bun run --cwd api dev:check && bun run --cwd web typecheck && bun run --cwd admin typecheck && bun run lint && bun run format:check
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd api typecheck && bun run --cwd web typecheck && bun run --cwd admin typecheck
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration
